papers.description: Will consist of forty multiple-choice objective questions all of which are to be answered in 45 minutes for 40 marks.
Will consist of five short-structured essay questions. Candidates will be required to answer any four in 1 hour for 60 marks.
Will be a practical test. It will consist of two sections, Sections A and B, taking 2.5 hours and carrying 100 marks.

sections.instructions: For candidates in Nigeria, Sierra Leone and The Gambia only. It will be on BUILDING DRAWING and shall consist of four questions including a compulsory one. Candidates will be required to answer the compulsory question and any two of the other questions.
For candidates in Ghana only. It will consist of six essay questions including a compulsory one. Candidates will be required to answer the compulsory question and any three of the other questions.

content_notes: Definition of building
Classification and types
Introduction to National Building Codes. (Building regulations and Byelaw requirements)
Definition, purpose and procedures for building construction
Parties in the construction team. (Client's team, contractor's team and statutory personnel.)
Function of the team members.
Relationship of the parties.
Definition of safety, rules and regulation.
Hazards in the workshop and construction site.
Causes and method of accident prevention.
Safety equipment and measures at construction site.
First aid equipment, procedures and safety wears.
Safety in working with dangerous equipment and materials (electricity, scaffolding, formwork, cement, roof, etc).
Identification and functions of basic tools and equipment.
Care of tools and equipment.
Operations involved in site clearing.
Tools and equipment for site clearing and levelling.
Basic site levelling operations.
Preliminary operations in building construction.
Procedure for site layout.
Location, boundary lines, hoarding, hutments and access road.
Methods of setting-out. (3:4:5 method, Builders' square method).
Tools and equipment for setting out.
Procedures for setting out.
Use of drawing tools and simple exercise on plane geometry in relation to building.
Building drawing symbols
Scales used in building and their application on site.
Production drawings and interpretations (Plans, Elevations, sections and details).
Special details (Detailing building elements including doors and windows schedule).
Scaling (Enlargement, pictorial and perspectives.
Definitions and use of Auto-CADD.
Classifications, types and properties of soil.
Definition and function of excavation.
Methods of excavations.
Tools, equipment and plant used for excavation.
Solution to excavation problems (Earthwork support, timbering battering and dewatering).
Safety rules during excavations.
Definition, purpose and functional requirement of foundation.
Types of foundation.
Factors that determine choice of foundation.
Types, functions and functional requirement of ground floor.
Methods of construction ground floor.
Definition of basement.
Explain differences between building with basement and without basement.
Problems relating basement in a building.
Definition and functions of upper floor
Methods of construction concrete floors and timber upper floors.
Definition and types of concrete.
Materials for concrete.

Definitions types, components and manufacture of cement. Properties and uses of cement including other alternatives to cement product e.g. Pozzolana, Pulverize fuel Ash (P.F.A.), Rice husk ash (R.H.A), etc
Types and uses of aggregates (other aggregates such as palm kernel shell) and periwinkle, etc.
Types and uses of reinforcements.
Properties and characteristic of concrete
Process of concrete production.
Types of concrete tests.
Definition, types and functions of walls
Definition, types and properties of walling materials. (including locally sourced materials).
Manufacturing processes of walling materials (clay, brick, blocks and concrete blocks).
Sizes of blocks and bricks.
Mortar mixes for brick.
Methods of wall construction
Timber wall construction.
Definition and function of wall openings.
Methods of constructing wall opening.
Functions of lintels and arches.
Definition, functions and types of doors and windows.
Methods of mixing doors and window frames.
Definition, classification, types and uses of stairs.
Materials used for construction of stairs.
Materials used for finishing staircases.
Types of fitting in plumbing and sanitary works.
Materials for plumbing works and fittings.
Types of sanitary appliances.
Soil and waste appliances.
Installation of sanitary appliances
Terms used in drainage works.
Principles and functional requirement of drainage system.
Types of drainage system.
Types of drainage materials (pipes and fittings).
Methods of laying and testing drain lines.
Description of septic and soakaway (inspection chamber, manhole, etc).

detailed_syllabus.topic: Electrical installation and solar energy system.
content_notes: Electrical symbols, installation terms and materials.
Identification and uses of electrical wiring materials.
Types of electrical wiring.
Definition, functions and components of solar energy systems.
Definition, purpose and types of roof.
Functional requirements of roof.
Materials used for roofs.
Roof covering materials.
Protection of roof from wind, rain, lightening, etc.
Floors: Types, characteristics, methods of laying, uses, care and maintenance of floor finishes.
Walls: Types, characteristics, plastering, rendering, and methods of applying mix.
Ceiling: Types, function, and ceiling finishing materials.
Types of fence, materials for fencing and construction of fence.
Types of gate, fixing of gates and production of gate.
Types and materials for construction of access roads.
Construction of access road.
Needs and materials for landscaping.
Procedures for landscaping.

detailed_syllabus.topic: Types of Business Organization and Ways of Raising Capital.
content_notes: Principles and Management of Business
Organization in the building industry.
Types of Business Organization in the Building Industry.
Types and sources of Capital.
Book Keeping in small scale businesses.
Books of original entries.
Definition and types of contract.
Contract documents.
Parties to a contract.

suggested_reading_list.author: Stephen Emmitt and Christopher A. Gorse
suggested_reading_list.title: Barry's Introduction to Construction in Buildings

suggested_reading_list.author: R. Barry
suggested_reading_list.title: The Construction of Buildings Vols I-V

suggested_reading_list.author: Adesokan and M. O. Adeniyi
suggested_reading_list.title: Building Construction for Senior Secondary Schools Vols 1 - 3 (Ilesanmi)
